companyNameJapanese: 天水華天科技股份有限公司
description: China's third-largest OSAT company. Provides semiconductor packaging and testing services including 3D, SiP, FC, TSV, Bumping, Fan-Out, and WLP advanced packaging technologies. Diversified customer base. Strategic partnership with Yangtze Memory Technologies (YMTC). FY2024 revenue: ~$2.01B (+26% YoY).

_externalRelationships.notes: World #6 OSAT. Listed on Shenzhen Stock Exchange. FY2024 revenue: $2.01B (+26% YoY). Founded in 2003, IPO in 2007. HQ in Tianshui, Gansu Province. Relatively diversified customer base compared to peers. Chinese domestic equipment being validated on production lines for dicing and probing.
